## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [XML import still in progress; manual publishing to continue in the interim](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Early SEO signals positive: new keywords ranking, traffic stable](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Content adjustments needed: add H2 subheads, avoid pricing discussions, reduce US-centricity](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Trends articles to be reviewed and potentially refreshed for ongoing relevance](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Process

  - [Manual publishing to resume while XML import is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Rachel to be tagged for article reviews during Aida's vacation](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Topics and subtopics to be added to Airtable for easier publishing](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [12 articles published so far, unchanged from last week](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Traffic stable week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Position tracking report shows positive movement:](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [3 new keywords in top 3 positions](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
      - [6 new keywords in top 10 positions](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Notable improvements for keywords like "cross border payments in gaming" (77 → 3)](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Ranking for some unintended keywords (e.g., "gambling cross-border payments")](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

### Content Adjustments

  - [Add H2 subheads under H1 headlines for preview text](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Avoid discussing Rapyd pricing due to complexity and negotiation-based model](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Reduce US-centric examples; default to EU or other regions](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Remove overused words like "various" from content](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

### Trends Articles Strategy

  - [Review existing trends articles for ongoing relevance](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Consider refreshing content annually without year in URL](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Collaborate on identifying unique, Rapyd-relevant trends](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Potentially start working on 2025 trends in late 2024](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

### Redirect and URL Management

  - [Jakub working on redirects for old content](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Special consideration for network-related pages (about 20)](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Review of integration links and plugin pages](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to coordinate with Rachel on checking published articles in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

  - [Mark and Kristin to review trends articles and prioritize for refresh](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Aida to update AI model with new content guidelines (subheads, pricing, region focus)](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Rachel to be mindful of US-centric content during editing](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance and position tracking report](https://fathom.video/share/55CCbs6Jbg-2zMxhkHgo8A2aNjY9T-Ai?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
